title: Vanilla Mediteranean Bliss
description: A fresh and fluffy mediterranean dish featuring vanilla sugar, designed for a gluten-free option with its light and soothing flavors.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the vanilla sugar and honey. Mix until well combined.
Add the fresh strawberries into the mixture and mix gently with a spoon to ensure they are evenly coated with the sweetener. The berries should be slightly softened but not mushy.
Gently toss in the almond cookies, ensuring each cookie is coated lightly.
Transfer the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Spread it out evenly so that the cookies remain distinct and visible.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown on the edges but still soft in the center.
Remove from the oven, let it cool slightly to room temperature.
Drizzle each slice with freshly squeezed lemon juice just before serving.
Garnish with extra fresh strawberries and a pinch of flaky sea salt if desired.
